title: WynnScales
description: View Wynncraft mythic weights when hovering over items
body:
> Wynnscales is currently broken. I'll be overhauling this mod with some new utility soon.

I made this a while back for my guild but never released it publicly. It's since been integrated into Wynntils, I'll release it here anyways if you'd like a more condensed layout.

WynnScales allows you to view Nori.fish and Wynnpool scales directly in game while hovering over an item. You can disable displaying either source from your modmenu config.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f89a11d590b2c6075f958e09a80bd405a027c410.png)
